enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks
- Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Small Finance Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Finance Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset
classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as
prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, in addition to these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as prescribed

size, sector or types of limits, shall be covered in the automated IT based

processes.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

current mark-to-market value of a derivative contract before its maturity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in cases where the contract provides for settlement of the
current mark-to-market value of a derivative contract before its maturity, only
the current credit exposure (not the potential future exposure) shall be
classified as a non-performing asset after an overdue period of 90 days;
enriched_requirements.object: non-performing asset after an overdue period of 90 days

conditions:
where a bank partially or fully terminates the
derivative contract before maturity

if the amount
becomes overdue for 90 days from the date of partial / full termination of the
derivative contract
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in cases where a bank partially or fully terminates the
derivative contract before maturity, at their discretion, based on preference
of the clients to reduce the notional exposure of the hedging derivative
contract, and the bank permitted payment in instalments of the crystallized
MTM of such derivative contracts (including Forex Forward Contracts), the
recievable shall be classified as non-performing asset: (i) if the amount
becomes overdue for 90 days from the date of partial / full termination of the
derivative contract;
enriched_requirements.object: asset: (i) if the amount becomes overdue for 90 days from the date of partial / full termination of the derivative con

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the conditions in paragraph 38, an account may also be classified
as NPA in terms of certain specific provisions of this Chapter, including inter alia
paragraphs 47 to 58 as well as instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of
India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA in terms of certain specific provisions of this Chapter, including inter alia paragraphs 47 to 58 as well as instructions co

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Asset classification shall be borrower-wise and not facility-wise.
enriched_requirements.object: facility-wise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All the facilities
granted by a bank to a borrower and investment in all the securities issued by the
borrower shall have to be treated as NPA / NPI and not the particular facility /
investment or part thereof which has become irregular.
enriched_requirements.object: as NPA / NPI and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become irregular

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The classification of an asset as NPA shall be based on the record of recovery.
enriched_requirements.object: record of recovery

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not classify an advance account as NPA merely due to the existence
of some deficiencies which are temporary in nature such as non-availability of
adequate drawing power based on the latest available stock statement, balance
outstanding exceeding the limit temporarily, non-submission of stock statements
and non-renewal of the limits on the due date, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: as NPA merely due to the existence of some deficiencies which are temporary in nature such as non-availability of adequate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The availability of security or net worth of borrower / guarantor shall not be taken
into account for the purpose of treating an advance as NPA (except to the extent
provided in paragpraph 63or otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: for the purpose of treating an advance as NPA (except to the extent provided in paragpraph 63or otherwise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The asset classification of borrowal accounts where a solitary or a few credits are
recorded before the balance sheet date should be handled with care and without
scope for subjectivity.
enriched_requirements.object: and without scope for subjectivity

conditions:
Where the account indicates inherent weakness on the basis of the data
available
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where the account indicates inherent weakness on the basis of the data
available, the account should be deemed as NPA.

In other genuine cases, a bank shall furnish satisfactory evidence to the Statutory
Auditors / Inspecting Officers about the manner of regularisation of the account
to eliminate doubts on their performing status.
enriched_requirements.object: the Statutory Auditors / Inspecting Officers about the manner of regularisation of the account to eliminate doubts on

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bills discounted under Letter of Credit (LC) favouring a borrower may not be
classified as NPA, when any other facility granted to the borrower is classified as
NPA.

Notwithstanding paragraph 46, in case documents under LC are not accepted on
presentation or the payment under the LC is not made on the due date by the LC
issuing bank for any reason and the borrower does not immediately make good
the amount disbursed as a result of discounting of concerned bills, the
outstanding bills discounted shall immediately be classified as NPA with effect
from the date when the other facilities had been classified as NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA with effect from the date when the other facilities had been classified as NPA

conditions:
In case the overdues arising from forward contracts and plain vanilla
swaps and options become NPAs
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Derivative Contracts
(1) In case the overdues arising from forward contracts and plain vanilla
swaps and options become NPAs, all other funded facilities granted to
the client shall also be classified as NPA following the principle of
borrower-wise classification.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA following the principle of borrower-wise classification

conditions:
If the client concerned is also a borrower of the bank enjoying a Cash
Credit or Overdraft facility from the bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) If the client concerned is also a borrower of the bank enjoying a Cash
Credit or Overdraft facility from the bank, the receivables from the
derivative contract may be debited to that account on due date and the
impact of its non-payment shall be reflected in the cash credit / overdraft
facility account.
enriched_requirements.object: cash credit / overdraft facility account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The income recognition in respect of the derivative contracts classified
as NPA shall be as per paragraph 131.

Advances under consortium arrangements
(1) Asset classification of accounts under consortium shall be based on the
record of recovery of the individual member and other aspects having a
bearing on the recoverability of the advances.
enriched_requirements.object: record of recovery of the individual member and other aspects having a bearing on the recoverability of the advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A bank participating in the consortium should, therefore, arrange to get
its share of recovery transferred from the lead bank or get an express
<image>
consent from the lead bank for the transfer of its share of recovery, to
ensure proper asset classification in its books.
enriched_requirements.object: get its share of recovery transferred from the lead bank or get an express <image> consent from the lead bank for the transfer

conditions:
in case of short duration crops
and one crop season in case of long duration crops
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Advances to Primary Agricultural Credit Societies (PACS) / Farmers' Service
Societies (FSS) ceded to banks
(1) In respect of agricultural advances as well as advances for other
purposes granted by a bank to PACS / FSS under the on-lending system,
only that particular credit facility granted to PACS / FSS which is in
default for a period of two crop seasons in case of short duration crops
and one crop season in case of long duration crops, as the case may be,
after it has become due will be classified as NPA, and not all the credit
facilities sanctioned to a PACS / FSS.
enriched_requirements.object: become due will be classified as NPA, and not all the credit facilities sanctioned to a PACS / FSS

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The other direct loans and advances, if any, granted by the bank to the
member borrower of a PACS / FSS outside the on-lending arrangement
shall become NPA even if one of the credit facilities granted to the same
borrower becomes NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: one of the credit facilities granted to the same borrower becomes NPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such loans /
advances shall be classified as NPA only when there is a default in
repayment of instalment of principal or payment of interest on the
respective due dates.
enriched_requirements.object: only when there is a default in repayment of instalment of principal or payment of interest on the respective due dates

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Agricultural advances
(1) Depending upon the duration of crops raised by an agriculturist, the NPA
norms as per sub-paragraphs 38(6) and 38(7) shall also be made
applicable to agricultural term loans availed of by them.
enriched_requirements.object: to agricultural term loans availed of by them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The NPA norms as per sub-paragraphs 38(6) and 38(7) shall be made
applicable only to the following credit facilities extended for agricultural
activities:
enriched_requirements.object: to the following credit facilities extended for agricultural activities:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(a) crop loans to farmers, which shall include traditional / non-
traditional plantations, and horticulture;
enriched_requirements.object: traditional plantations, and horticulture

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(a) crop loans to farmers which shall include traditional / non-
traditional plantations and horticulture;
enriched_requirements.object: traditional plantations and horticulture

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In respect of agricultural loans, other than those specified in sub-
paragraph (2) above, identification of NPAs shall be done on the same
basis as non-agricultural advances, which at present is the 90 days
delinquency norm.
enriched_requirements.object: same basis as non-agricultural advances, which at present is the 90 days delinquency norm

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 1[***]
(5) In such cases of conversion or re-schedulement, the term loan as well
as fresh short-term loan may be treated as current dues and need not be
classified as NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: dues and need not be classified as NPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) While fixing the repayment schedule in case of rural housing advances
granted to agriculturists under Indira Awas Yojana / Pradhan Mantri
Gram Awas Yojana and Golden Jubilee Rural Housing Finance Scheme,
a bank shall ensure that the interest / instalment payable on such
advances are linked to crop cycles.
enriched_requirements.object: / instalment payable on such advances are linked to crop cycles

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Government guaranteed advances
(1) The credit facilities backed by guarantee of the Central Government
though overdue shall be treated as NPA only when the Government
repudiates its guarantee when invoked.
enriched_requirements.object: only when the Government repudiates its guarantee when invoked

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) State Government guaranteed advances and investments in State
Government guaranteed securities shall attract asset classification and
provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due
to the bank remains overdue for more than 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue for more than 9

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In such cases, where the lending bank is able to establish through
documentary evidence that the importer has cleared the dues in full by
depositing the amount in the bank abroad before it turned into NPA in
the books of the bank, but the importer's country is not allowing the funds
to be remitted due to political or other reasons, the asset classification
may be made after a period of one year from the date the amount was
deposited by the importer in the bank abroad.
enriched_requirements.object: period of one year from the date the amount was deposited by the importer in the bank abroad

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Transfer of Loan Exposures - The asset classification and provisioning
requirements in respect of transactions involving transfer of loans shall be as per
the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Transfer and Distribution of
Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Credit Card Accounts
(1) A bank shall report a credit card account as 'past due' to credit
information companies (CICs) or levy penal charges, viz.
enriched_requirements.object: account as 'past due' to credit information companies (CICs) or levy penal charges, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The number of 'days overdue' and late payment charges shall, however,
be computed from the payment due date mentioned in the credit card
statement.
enriched_requirements.object: from the payment due date mentioned in the credit card statement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Takeout finance
(1) The asset classification norms shall be followed by the concerned bank
in whose books the account stands as balance sheet item as on the
relevant date.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned bank in whose books the account stands as balance sheet item as on the relevant date

conditions:
Where the credit facility becomes NPA before take over by the taking
over institution
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Where the credit facility becomes NPA before take over by the taking
over institution, the lending bank shall classify the asset as NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Subsequent to take over by a bank, the taking over bank shall classify
the asset as NPA from the actual date of it becoming NPA even though
the account was not in its books as on that date.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA from the actual date of it becoming NPA even though the account was not in its books as on that date

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a resolution plan is implemented in adherence to the provisions of Chapter VI-A
of Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, borrower accounts which are classified as
'Standard' may be retained as such upon implementation.
enriched_requirements.object: upon implementation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Borrower accounts which
may have slipped into NPA between the date of occurrence of the natural calamity and
implementation of the resolution plan, shall be upgraded as 'Standard', upon
implementation of the resolution plan.
enriched_requirements.object: upon implementation of the resolution plan

conditions: Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan, the subsequent asset
classification shall be governed by the criteria laid out in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: criteria laid out in these Directions

conditions:
where a subsequent restructuring is necessitated under the
provisions of Chapter VI-A of the aforesaid Directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accounts which are restructured under paragraph 124I to 124Q of the Reserve Bank of
India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 dated
November 28, 2025, where a subsequent restructuring is necessitated under the
provisions of Chapter VI-A of the aforesaid Directions, shall continue to be classified as
'Standard'.]
E.
enriched_requirements.object: as 'Standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall classify non-performing assets further into 'substandard assets',
'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories based on the period for which the
asset has remained non-performing and the realisability of the dues.
enriched_requirements.object: into 'substandard assets', 'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories based on the period for which the ass

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NPA classified as loss asset is considered uncollectible and of such little value
that its continuance as a bankable asset is not warranted although there may be
some salvage or recovery value.
enriched_requirements.object: recovery value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding paragraph 42, in respect of accounts where there are potential
threats for recovery on account of erosion in the value of security or non-
availability of security and existence of other factors such as frauds committed by
borrowers, the asset should be straightaway classified as doubtful or loss asset
as appropriate.
enriched_requirements.object: doubtful or loss asset as appropriate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of paragraph 63, the following shall apply:
(1) erosion in the value of security shall be reckoned as significant when the
realisable value of the security is less than fifty per cent of the value
assessed by the bank or accepted by the Reserve Bank at the time of
<image>
last inspection, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: the value of security shall be reckoned as significant when the realisable value of the security is less than fifty per cent of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such NPAs may be straightaway
classified under doubtful category.
enriched_requirements.object: doubtful category

conditions: if the realisable value of the security
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) if the realisable value of the security, as assessed by the bank / approved
valuers / the Reserve Bank is less than ten per cent of the outstanding
in the borrowal accounts, the existence of security shall be ignored and
the asset shall be straightaway classified as loss asset.
enriched_requirements.object: asset shall be straightaway classified as loss asset

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The loan accounts classified as NPAs may be upgraded as 'standard' asset only
if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With regard to upgradation of accounts classified as NPA due to restructuring,
non-achievement of date of commencement of commercial operations (DCCO),
etc., the instructions as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance
Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 shall be applicable in
addition to compliance with these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: to compliance with these Directions

conditions: In case of borrowers having more than one credit facility from a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of borrowers having more than one credit facility from a bank, loan
accounts shall be upgraded from NPA to standard asset category only upon
repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit
facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilitie

The provisioning shall be made on the basis of the classification of assets based
on the period for which the asset has remained non-performing and the
availability of security and the realisable value thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: basis of the classification of assets based on the period for which the asset has remained non-performing and the availability of secur

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Taking into account the time lag between an account becoming doubtful of
recovery, its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the erosion
over time in the value of security charged to the bank, the bank shall make
provision against substandard assets, doubtful assets and loss assets.
enriched_requirements.object: assets, doubtful assets and loss assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For determining the amount of unsecured advances for reflecting in Schedule 9
of the published balance sheet, the rights, licenses, authorisations, etc., charged
to the bank as collateral in respect of projects (including infrastructure projects)
financed by them, should not be reckoned as tangible security.
enriched_requirements.object: security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Hence such
advances shall be reckoned as unsecured.

conditions:
where there are provisions to
compensate the project sponsor if a certain level of traffic is not achieved
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may treat annuities under build-operate-transfer (BOT) model in respect
of road / highway projects and toll collection rights, where there are provisions to
compensate the project sponsor if a certain level of traffic is not achieved, as
tangible securities subject to the condition that the right of the bank to receive
annuities and toll collection rights is legally enforceable and irrevocable.
enriched_requirements.object: (BOT) model in respect of road / highway projects and toll collection rights

conditions: In case of public-private partnership (PPP) projects
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of public-private partnership (PPP) projects, the debts due to a bank may
be considered as secured to the extent assured by the project authority in terms
of the Concession Agreement, subject to the following conditions:
<image>
(1) user charges / toll / tariff payments are kept in an escrow account where
senior lenders have priority over withdrawals by the concessionaire;
enriched_requirements.object: to the extent assured by the project authority in terms of the Concession Agreement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) In all such cases, a bank shall satisfy itself about the legal enforceability
of the provisions of the tripartite agreement and factor in their past
experience with such contracts.
enriched_requirements.object: legal enforceability of the provisions of the tripartite agreement and factor in their past experience with such contracts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make general provision for standard assets at the following rates for
the funded outstanding on global loan portfolio basis:
(1) farm credit to agricultural activities, individual housing loans and Small
and Micro Enterprises (SMEs) sectors at 0.25 per cent;

provisioning.
The provisions on standard assets shall not be reckoned for arriving at net NPAs.

Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.

shall be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of
hundred per cent.

For accounts where repeated restructuring is necessitated in terms of Chapter VIA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This additional specific provisioning shall be over and above the
applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The additional specific provisions maintained in terms of paragraph 80A and 80B
above may be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the outstanding
debt with the bank, without slipping into NPA post implementation of the
restructuring, and without being subjected to another restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: the borrower paying at least 20% of the outstanding debt with the bank, without slipping into NPA post implementation of the rest

conditions:
In case the borrower
defaults during the above period
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the borrower
defaults during the above period, the conditions for reversal of additional specific
provisions, mentioned above, shall be tested from the date of rectification of default.]
C.

A general provision of 15 percent on total outstanding shall be made in respect

balance

Period for which the advance has remained in 'doubtful' category

Principles for utilisation of floating provisions
(1) The floating provisions shall not be used for making specific provisions
as per the extant prudential guidelines in respect of non-performing
assets or for making regulatory provisions for standard assets.
